title: Add 2012's bot to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [2012's bot](https://2012hhh2012.qzz.io/2012sbot/) to bots
- Entertain users and provide server utilities via 2012's bot for Discord, including AI-powered features and image generation using pollinations.ai API.

Fixes #9975

gist.headline: 2012's Bot enters the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: A new Discord bot just landed in the community showcase! 2012's Bot brings AI-powered server utilities and image generation straight to your Discord server.
gist.summary: Added '2012's bot', a Discord bot featuring AI utilities and image generation via the pollinations.ai API, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and add 2012's bot to their Discord servers for AI-powered entertainment and utility features.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with a retro/gamer-themed robot representing a Discord bot. The robot should have a headset or chat-bubble motif, and they should be collaborating on generating an image.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gamer headset, high-fiving a chunky retro robot with a glowing chat bubble on its chest. The robot is holding a freshly generated pixel art picture. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gamer headset, high-fiving a chunky retro robot with a glowing chat bubble on its chest. The robot is holding a freshly generated pixel art picture. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
